title: Crumbly Creamy Italian Colby Jack Cheese Pasta
description: A paleo-friendly Italian dish featuring Colby Jack cheese and a crumbly texture, with a hint of herbal flavors from fresh parsley and basil.
instructions: Cook the gluten-free pasta according to the package instructions.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked pasta, shredded Colby Jack cheese, chopped parsley, and chopped basil.
In a separate bowl, mix together the almond flour, olive oil, garlic powder, and salt.
Add the dry mixture to the pasta mixture and stir until well combined.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish and top with additional shredded Colby Jack cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
